sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Xos Finalizes Separation Agreement With Former General Counsel
feed.summary: Xos (XOS) finalized a separation agreement with its former General Counsel and Secretary, Christen T. Romero, who resigned in January 2025. The agreement, signed on April 24, 2026, includes a $110,000 cash payment, accelerated vesting of 120,000 restricted stock units with a lock-up, potential additional cash, and reimbursement for legal fees. Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, rates XOS as Neutral, noting improved fundamentals like positive free cash flow but tempered by weak profitability and a bearish technical trend.

feed.title: WASH SEC Filings - Washington Tr Bancorp Inc 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides access to Washington Trust Bancorp's (NASDAQ: WASH) SEC filings, including 10-K annual reports, 10-Q quarterly reports, 8-K material events, and insider trading forms. StockTitan offers these regulatory disclosures, enriched with AI-generated summaries, impact scoring, and sentiment analysis to help investors understand the company's financial health, operations, and governance. The filings cover key financial data like earnings, net interest income, loan and deposit trends, and capital ratios, alongside significant corporate developments.

This Schedule 13G filing indicates a passive investment position, with Vanguard exercising sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 39,606 shares. The report clarifies this is for investment purposes rather than activist intent.

(NASDAQ: VNDA), which represents 4.2% of the class. The filing specifies that BlackRock holds sole voting power over 2,206,827 shares and sole dispositive power over 2,508,488 shares. This passive institutional holding is below the 5% threshold typically associated with activist investor signaling.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management holds 5.76M VOYA shares (VOYA) — 6.20% disclosed

This Schedule 13G filing indicates Vanguard has sole dispositive power over all these shares but sole voting power for only 25,653 shares. The filing was signed on April 29, 2026, by Ashley Grim.

feed.title: 5-Day Sell-Off Sends Freeport-McMoRan Stock Down 19%
feed.summary: Freeport-McMoRan (FCX) stock has experienced a significant 19% sell-off over a five-day period. The article title highlights this sharp decline, indicating recent negative market performance for the company.

feed.title: Moderna Stock 5-Day Losing Spree: Stock Falls 18%
feed.summary: Moderna (MRNA) stock experienced a five-day losing streak, resulting in an 18% decline. The article mentions financial market data sources and disclaimers regarding data delays and interactive model limitations.

feed.title: Vista Energy Delivers Strong Q1 2026 Growth on La Amarga Chica Expansion Despite Negative Free Cash Flow
feed.summary: Vista Energy reported strong Q1 2026 financial results, with production up 67% year-on-year to 134,741 boe/d and revenues increasing by 58%. This growth was primarily fueled by the acquisition of a 50% working interest in the La Amarga Chica block and organic growth. Despite increased production and higher adjusted EBITDA, the company experienced negative free cash flow due to heavy capital expenditure in Vaca Muerta, Equinor-related payments, and non-recurring working capital and tax items, leading to higher borrowings.

feed.title: Q1 2026 results dip at United States Lime (NASDAQ: USLM)
feed.summary: United States Lime & Minerals (NASDAQ: USLM) reported a dip in Q1 2026 results, with revenues decreasing to $87.8 million from $91.3 million a year earlier, primarily due to lower sales volumes in construction, oil and gas services, and roof shingle sectors. Net income fell to $30.6 million, or $1.06 diluted EPS, compared to $34.1 million, or $1.19 diluted EPS, impacted by higher fuel and transportation costs. Despite the softer earnings, the company maintained its quarterly cash dividend of $0.06 per share and expressed optimism for the rest of 2026, highlighting progress on a new kiln at its Texas facility.

feed.title: Upstart Holdings Inc (UPST) Stock Down 7.2% -- Now Undervalued? GF Score: 69/100
feed.summary: Upstart Holdings Inc (UPST) stock recently dropped 7.2%, closing at $30.48, and is considered undervalued with a GF Value™ estimate of $54.29. Despite an above-average GF Score™ of 69/100 for long-term returns, the company faces challenges in profitability and financial strength, and insiders have been selling shares. Investors are advised to exercise caution due to these mixed signals and the potential for a value trap.

feed.title: [SCHEDULE 13G] UPWORK, INC Passive Investment Disclosure (>5%)
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has filed a Schedule 13G for Upwork Inc., indicating beneficial ownership of 7,881,301 shares of Common Stock, which represents 6.04% of the class as of March 31, 2026. The filing highlights Vanguard's passive investment approach, with limited voting power but full dispositive power over the reported shares. This disclosure, common for passive investors, does not suggest any intent to change or influence the control of the issuer.

feed.title: Washington Trust Bancorp Annual Meeting: New Director Elected, Equity Plan Expanded, Votes Pass
feed.summary: Washington Trust Bancorp (NASDAQ: WASH) held its 2026 Annual Meeting, electing four directors, ratifying Crowe LLP as auditor, and approving an amendment to its 2022 Long-Term Incentive Plan to increase available shares by 500,000. The company reported strategic progress, including a full-year net income of $52.2 million for 2025 and improved net interest margin in Q1 2026, while also announcing growth initiatives like a new institutional banking team and a Pawtucket branch. Edward O. Handy III, CEO, highlighted the retirement of director Constance A. Howes and welcomed new director Jeffrey Wilhelm, emphasizing the company's focus on sustainable long-term performance and expansion.

feed.title: UWM Holdings: Mat Ishbia’s SFS Holding Corp sells $7.1 million in stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: SFS Holding Corp, an entity connected to UWM Holdings Corp CEO Mat Ishbia, recently sold 1,987,218 shares of Class A Common Stock worth approximately $7.1 million over two days in late April 2026. These sales were conducted under a 10b5-1 trading plan as UWM Holdings shares trade near a 52-week low. The transactions follow a revenue outperformance in Q4 2025 and occur amidst an unsolicited acquisition proposal for Two Harbors Investment Corp, with UWM Holdings engaging Okapi Partners for proxy solicitation.

feed.title: Twin Hospitality Appoints Restructuring Specialist as Interim CEO
feed.summary: Twin Hospitality Group Inc. Class A (TWNPQ) has appointed Keshav Lall, a restructuring specialist, as interim CEO across the company and its subsidiaries, effective April 29, 2026. Lall's appointment, provided through his advisory firm for $100,000 per month, signals the company's efforts to manage financial stress and operational disruption. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates TWNPQ as Underperform due to severe financial instability and material restructuring risk.

feed.title: Welltower sees historic senior housing net operating income; pipeline remains ‘robust’
feed.summary: Welltower reported a historic increase in net operating income and revenue growth during its first-quarter earnings call, significantly driven by its senior housing operating portfolio (SHOP). The company's CEO, Shankh Mitra, noted the highest total portfolio same-store NOI growth in company history at 16.4%, with SHOP contributing 22.1% growth, and reiterated a robust investment pipeline. Welltower is also focusing on leveraging technology and data science to drive further bottom-line growth and scale real estate investing.

feed.title: [10-Q] CVR PARTNERS, LP Quarterly Earnings Report
feed.summary: CVR Partners (UAN) reported a strong first quarter of 2026, with net sales increasing to $180.0 million from $142.9 million year-over-year, and net income almost doubling to $49.9 million. This growth was primarily driven by higher fertilizer prices and solid plant utilization, particularly due to increased ammonia and UAN prices and higher ammonia volumes. The company declared a significant $4.00 per-unit distribution for Q1 2026 and outlined capital spending plans focused on enhancing operational reliability and production capacity.

feed.title: EXCLUSIVE: Xcel Brands Sells Judith Ripka
feed.summary: Xcel Brands, a media and consumer products firm, has sold its Judith Ripka jewelry brand to Fuzion Creations for approximately $3 million. Xcel Brands, which acquired Judith Ripka 12 years ago for $20 million, is shifting its business model to focus on influencer-led brands through social commerce and live streaming. Fuzion Creations, a fine jewelry wholesale manufacturer, will continue the legacy of the luxury brand.

feed.title: Transcript : Trustmark Corporation, Q1 2026 Earnings Call, Apr 29, 2026
feed.summary: This article provides the transcript of Trustmark Corporation's Q1 2026 Earnings Call, held on April 29, 2026. The content mentions that the article is primarily reserved for subscribers, indicating detailed financial discussions are behind a paywall. It also notes recent news regarding Trustmark's Q1 earnings and revenue.

feed.title: Trustmark shareholders approve board slate and auditor at annual meeting
feed.summary: Trustmark Corp (NASDAQ:TRMK) shareholders recently approved the election of all eleven nominated directors to serve until the 2027 annual meeting. They also approved, on an advisory basis, the compensation of executive officers and ratified Crowe LLP as the independent auditor for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2026. This follows the company's mixed first-quarter 2026 earnings, where it surpassed EPS expectations but missed revenue projections.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management discloses 6.64% stake in Tennant Co (NYSE: TNC)
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has disclosed a 6.64% beneficial ownership stake in Tennant Co (NYSE: TNC), totaling 1,195,992 shares, according to a recent Schedule 13G SEC filing. While Vanguard holds sole dispositive power over all these shares, its sole voting power is limited to 6,965 shares. This filing indicates a passive investment intent and reflects holdings across various Vanguard affiliates and funds.

feed.title: Vanguard Portfolio Management holds 6.04M shares in Travel + Leisure (TNL)
feed.summary: Vanguard Portfolio Management has disclosed a beneficial ownership of 6,044,722 shares, representing 9.68% of Travel + Leisure Co.'s common stock, as of March 31, 2026. This information was filed via a routine Schedule 13G and indicates that Vanguard entities have sole dispositive power over these shares, acting on behalf of managed funds and clients. The filing highlights Vanguard's passive institutional stake in TNL.

feed.title: Telix study showed low kidney, salivary gland uptake in prostate cancer
feed.summary: Telix Pharmaceuticals presented Phase 2 OPTIMAL-PSMA data for TLX597-Tx, a prostate cancer therapeutic, showing low uptake in salivary glands and kidneys and higher tumor uptake at IPCS 2026. These findings suggest the potential for intensified dosing and improved tolerability, bolstering the development of TLX597-Tx for earlier-stage metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer (mHSPC). Telix is initiating a Phase 2 OPTIMAL-E study in mHSPC to further evaluate this novel radioligand therapy.

feed.title: Teladoc Health (NYSE: TDOC) Q1 2026 revenue dips as loss narrows
feed.summary: Teladoc Health reported a 2% year-over-year revenue decrease to $613.8 million in Q1 2026, while its net loss narrowed significantly from $93.0 million to $63.8 million, primarily due to the absence of a prior goodwill impairment charge. The company reaffirmed its full-year 2026 financial outlook, anticipating revenue between $2.48 billion and $2.58 billion and positive free cash flow. Integrated Care segment revenue grew, but BetterHelp revenue declined, reflecting mixed performance across its services.

feed.title: Tenable (NASDAQ: TENB) lifts 2026 outlook after stronger Q1 results
feed.summary: Tenable (NASDAQ: TENB) reported strong Q1 2026 results, surpassing revenue and profit expectations, and subsequently raised its full-year 2026 guidance. The company achieved 9.6% year-over-year revenue growth to $262.1 million, a positive GAAP income from operations of $8.8 million, and a non-GAAP diluted EPS of $0.47. Tenable also highlighted robust cash generation, with $88.0 million in net cash from operating activities and $88.6 million in unlevered free cash flow, and repurchased 6.1 million shares for $130.0 million.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Tenable beats Q1 2026 forecasts, stock reacts
feed.summary: Tenable Holdings, Inc. (TENB) exceeded Q1 2026 earnings and revenue forecasts, reporting an EPS of $0.47 against an anticipated $0.41 and revenue of $262.1 million. The company's performance was driven by new business growth, particularly through its AI-powered Tenable One platform, and professional services. Despite strong results, the stock experienced mixed reactions, rising initially during regular trading but declining in aftermarket hours, though analysts maintain a bullish outlook.

feed.title: EQT Corp director Vicky Bailey sells $246,136 in company stock By Investing.com
feed.summary: EQT Corp director Vicky Bailey sold 4,116 shares of company stock for $246,136 on April 27, 2026, fully divesting her direct ownership. This comes as EQT stock has seen an 11% year-to-date return and 17% gain over the past year, with the company also announcing strong first-quarter 2026 results that surpassed earnings and revenue expectations.

feed.title: Ultra Clean Holdings Q1 2026 Revenue and Earnings Beat Guidance on AI Demand
feed.summary: Ultra Clean Holdings, Inc. announced that its Q1 2026 revenue and earnings surpassed guidance, driven by strong execution and increasing demand from AI-driven computing in the semiconductor industry. CEO James Xiao highlighted significant investments by hyperscalers and cloud providers in data centers, anticipating robust growth in wafer fabrication equipment spending, especially in leading-edge foundry logic, high bandwidth memory, and advanced packaging. The company also expects a multi-year growth tailwind for its services business due to higher tool utilization and ongoing fab expansions fueled by AI demand.

feed.title: Tractor Supply taps real customers for ads to stand out from AI-generated content
feed.summary: Tractor Supply is using real customers, team members, and properties in its marketing campaigns to create authentic "Life Out Here" moments, especially in an era of AI-generated content. This strategy aims to highlight the real-life applications of its products and connect with customers on a more relatable level, driving traffic to its growing number of stores, particularly during the crucial spring season. The company also leverages multi-channel campaigns and local in-store events to engage customers and boost sales.

feed.title: Trupanion (NASDAQ: TRUP) COO sells 431 shares in planned trade
feed.summary: Trupanion's Chief Operating Officer, John R. Gallagher, sold 431 shares of common stock at $27.47 per share. This transaction was conducted under a pre-established Rule 10b5-1 trading plan for financial diversification, meaning the timing was not at his discretion. Following the sale, Gallagher continues to directly hold 31,526 shares of Trupanion stock.

feed.title: EXCLUSIVE: NIQ, Ulta Beauty Collaborate on Data Sharing
feed.summary: NIQ and Ulta Beauty are collaborating on a data-sharing partnership, with Ulta Beauty providing sales data for NIQ’s "Full View of Beauty" channel. This collaboration aims to offer a comprehensive understanding of consumer purchasing habits and motivations. NIQ will also become Ulta's primary insights panel provider, leveraging its 250,000 panelists to track shopping trips and help Ulta make data-backed decisions.

feed.title: Viavi Stock Is Trending Overnight: Here's What You Should Know
feed.summary: Viavi Solutions (NASDAQ:VIAV) shares surged over 25% after-hours on Wednesday following strong fiscal third-quarter results that surpassed analyst expectations. The company reported significant year-over-year growth in revenue and non-GAAP earnings per share, driven by its network and service enablement segment, and provided optimistic Q4 guidance. Analysts have also maintained a "Buy" rating with an increased price target, reflecting confidence in the stock's continued upside potential.

feed.title: Mine owner proposes water treatment
feed.summary: Newmont Mining Corp., owner of the Idarado Mine, is considering building a water treatment plant on Red Mountain Pass to remove heavy metals from water flowing into Red Mountain Creek. This proposal comes after efforts to reduce metals proved insufficient and was discussed at a public meeting hosted by the Uncompahgre Watershed Partnership.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Stock Underperforms Market Amid Revenue and Margin Concerns
feed.summary: Wells Fargo (WFC) stock has underperformed the broader market, declining 7.3% over the past six months while the S&P 500 gained 3.9%. This underperformance is attributed to concerns over the bank's revenue quality, including a significantly lower net interest income growth rate compared to the industry and a decline in its net interest margin. Additionally, the projected tangible book value per share growth for WFC is considered sluggish, leading analysts to suggest other stocks may be superior alternatives despite its current price-to-book ratio.

feed.title: UPS, FedEx To Return Billions In Tariffs To Customers
feed.summary: UPS and FedEx are preparing to return billions of dollars in tariff reimbursements to customers after a court ruling invalidated a set of import duties. UPS has already processed some refunds and expects to expand efforts as Customs and Border Protection (CBP) broadens its program, with refunds estimated to take 60 to 90 days. FedEx has also started submitting claims through CBP, intending to return funds directly to shippers and consumers.

feed.title: FDA Tavneos Proposal Puts Amgen Trial Integrity And Growth Story Under Review
feed.summary: The FDA's Center for Drug Evaluation and Research has proposed the withdrawal of Amgen's drug Tavneos, citing concerns about untrue statements of material facts and potential data manipulation in clinical trials. This development raises significant questions about Amgen's regulatory controls and data transparency, impacting investor confidence in the company's growth story. Investors will be closely watching Amgen's response, especially during its upcoming Q1 2026 earnings report, for insights into potential financial exposure and future regulatory implications.

feed.title: Church & Dwight (CHD) Reports Earnings Tomorrow: What To Expect
feed.summary: Church & Dwight (NYSE:CHD) is set to report its Q1 earnings this Friday. Analysts expect revenue to be flat year-on-year, and recent revisions have shown increased bearish sentiment. The article also provides context from peer companies like Procter & Gamble and WD-40, which have already reported positive revenue growth in their Q1 results.

feed.title: How Teladoc’s Slower Revenue but Narrower Losses Will Impact Teladoc Health (TDOC) Investors
feed.summary: Teladoc Health (TDOC) recently released its first-quarter 2026 results, showing a slight decrease in revenue to US$613.85 million but a narrower net loss of US$63.84 million. This suggests the company is improving cost control and efficiency despite softening top-line growth. Investors should watch if Teladoc can maintain cost discipline while stabilizing growth, especially with its BetterHelp platform and new initiatives like enhanced 24/7 Care.

feed.title: WisdomTree Earnings: What To Look For From WT
feed.summary: WisdomTree (WT) is set to announce its earnings this Friday, with analysts expecting a 45.6% year-on-year revenue growth. The company has a history of missing Wall Street's revenue estimates, but sentiment in the custody bank segment, including peers like Franklin Resources and BNY, has been positive recently. WisdomTree's share price is up 11.3% over the last month, nearing an average analyst price target of $19.18.

feed.title: Wipro Ltd. Technical Momentum Shifts Amid Bearish Signals
feed.summary: Wipro Ltd. has shifted to a more pronounced bearish technical trend, with deteriorating moving averages and bearish momentum indicators despite some mildly bullish weekly signals. The stock, currently trading at ₹200.70, has underperformed the Sensex significantly across multiple periods, and MarketsMOJO has upgraded its rating from Sell to Hold, indicating a cautious outlook. Investors are advised to be cautious and monitor key technical levels due to elevated downside risks.

feed.title: Accelerating Data Utility at Toyota: How vista Unifies Data Access and Governance via Data Mesh
feed.summary: Toyota Motor Corporation addressed data scalability issues caused by a centralized data library by developing "vista," a platform that offers a company-wide view of data. This platform transitions to a decentralized data mesh model, empowering domain experts with data management. By leveraging a data fabric on Databricks Unity Catalog for governance and access control, vista has reduced data wait times from months to weeks, facilitating advanced AI applications.

feed.title: Solana Sentiment Sours: VanEck’s VSOL Sees Swift Outflows Even as Short-Term Signal Turns Bullish
feed.summary: VanEck’s Solana ETF (VSOL) experienced significant outflows of over $1.4 million, representing about 9.3% of its assets under management, on April 27, 2026, indicating a swift shift in investor sentiment for the crypto product. Despite a 25.2% decline in SOL-USD over the past three months, a short-term technical signal now suggests a "Buy," hinting that the outflows might be due to profit-taking and volatility rather than a broader bearish turn for Solana. The ETF now holds $15,339,088 in AUM.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management owns 19.0M Ecolab shares (ECL) — 6.72%
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported beneficial ownership of 19,004,742 shares of Ecolab Inc. (ECL) common stock, representing 6.72% of the class. The Schedule 13G filing indicates Vanguard has sole voting power over 2,482,173 shares and sole dispositive power over all 19,004,742 shares. This significant filing provides transparency on the ownership landscape of Ecolab's shares.

feed.title: Citi: Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN.US) 1Q Results and 2Q Guidance Beat Expectations
feed.summary: Citi Research reported that Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN.US) exceeded expectations in its first-quarter results and second-quarter guidance. The company's 1Q revenue and operating income surpassed market and company forecasts, driven by strong growth in AWS, North America retail, and advertising. Citi maintains a Buy rating and a $285 price target for Amazon.

feed.title: First Tesla Semi rolls off high volume production line
feed.summary: Tesla announced that its first Semi truck has rolled off a high-volume production line, indicating it is on schedule for large-scale manufacturing of several new products in 2026. The all-electric truck is designed for long-haul freight with a range of up to 500 miles on a single charge. Tesla also plans to begin volume production of its Cybercab robotaxi and Megapack 3 battery system in 2026, with significant capital spending focused on expanding factories for these initiatives.

feed.title: Alecta Pensionsforsakring trims Alphabet Inc. Class A stake
feed.summary: Alecta Pensionsforsakring, managed by Magnus Billing, has reduced its stake in Alphabet Inc. Class A (GOOGL) by 653,500 shares. TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates GOOGL as "Outperform" due to strong financial quality and accelerating Cloud/AI demand, though technicals appear stretched and valuation is a moderating factor due to a premium P/E and low dividend yield. Alphabet's Class A shares have seen an 11.83% YTD price performance with a current market cap of $4228.2 billion.

feed.title: Alecta Pensionsforsakring Boosts Broadcom Stake by 398,900 Shares
feed.summary: Alecta Pensionsforsakring, managed by Magnus Billing, significantly increased its stake in Broadcom Inc. (AVGO) by purchasing 398,900 shares. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates AVGO as "Outperform" due to strong financial performance, high margins, exceptional free-cash-flow generation, and a bullish earnings outlook driven by AI growth. However, Spark notes that the stock is near overbought technically and valuation is a constraint due to its high P/E and low dividend yield.

feed.title: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) Q1 Earnings: What To Expect
feed.summary: Colgate-Palmolive (CL) is set to report its Q1 earnings, with the market anticipating a 6.4% year-on-year revenue growth, a significant turnaround from the previous year's 3% decrease. Analysts have become increasingly bullish, revising revenue estimates upwards in the last 30 days. The company's prior quarter saw strong results, beating both revenue and EBITDA estimates.

feed.title: Automatic Data Processing, Inc. 2026 Q3 - Results - Earnings Call Presentation (NASDAQ:ADP) 2026-04-29
feed.summary: Automatic Data Processing, Inc. (ADP) released its Q3 2026 earnings, reporting an EPS of $3.37, which beat estimates by $0.07. The company's revenue reached $5.94 billion, exceeding expectations by $90.81 million and representing a 6.95% year-over-year increase. This article presents the slide deck published by ADP in conjunction with their earnings call.

feed.title: SMCI Class Action Reminder - Robbins LLP Urges SMCI Investors to Contact the Firm for Information About Their Rights
feed.summary: Robbins LLP has reminded investors about a class action lawsuit filed against Super Micro Computer, Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI) for alleged violations of U.S. export control laws. The lawsuit claims that Super Micro illegally sold servers containing AI technology to companies in China, failing to disclose these transactions and internal control weaknesses to investors. As a result, the company's stock price dropped significantly after the U.S. Justice Department announced an indictment against individuals associated with Super Micro for these illicit activities.
